mapper.sql: dir.id, dir.dish_id, dir.ingredient_id, dir.quantity, dir.remark, dir.create_time, di.name as ingredient_name, di.unit

di.id, di.name, di.category_id, di.category, di.unit, di.calories, di.remark, di.enabled, di.create_time, di.update_time, c2.name as category_name, c1.id as parent_category_id, c1.name as parent_category_name, CONCAT(IFNULL(c1.name, ''), '/', IFNULL(c2.name, '')) as category_path_name
mapper.select:
select
from dish_ingredient di left join dish_ingredient_category c2 on di.category_id = c2.id left join dish_ingredient_category c1 on c2.parent_id = c1.id where di.id = #{id}
select di.* from dish_ingredient di inner join dish_ingredient_relation dir on di.id = dir.ingredient_id where dir.dish_id = #{dishId} order by dir.id

select
from dish_ingredient_relation dir inner join dish_ingredient di on dir.ingredient_id = di.id where dir.dish_id = #{dishId} order by dir.id

select
from dish_ingredient_relation dir inner join dish_ingredient di on dir.ingredient_id = di.id where dir.dish_id in
#{dishId}
order by dir.dish_id, dir.id
mapper.insert: insert into dish_ingredient_relation (dish_id, ingredient_id, quantity, remark, create_time) values (#{dishId}, #{dto.ingredientId}, #{dto.quantity}, #{dto.remark}, now())
